description:
Function:
Our humidifier is designed to efficiently increase the humidity levels in your living space, creating a more comfortable and healthier indoor environment. It employs advanced ultrasonic technology to produce a fine mist that evenly distributes moisture into the air, alleviating dryness that can cause discomfort such as sore throats, dry skin, and static electricity. Additionally, the humidifier features an optional night light and aroma therapy function, allowing you to customize your relaxation experience.

Application Scenarios:

  1. Home Use: Perfect for bedrooms, living rooms, and offices to maintain optimal humidity levels, especially during the dry winter months.
  2. Baby Rooms: Helps soothe babies and young children by providing a moist environment that can relieve congestion and improve sleep quality.
  3. Plants Care: Ideal for indoor plant enthusiasts to keep their greenery thriving by ensuring they receive the necessary humidity.
  4. Health & Wellness: Beneficial for individuals with respiratory conditions like asthma or allergies, as it can help alleviate symptoms by keeping the air moist.

Product Specifications:

  • Capacity: 0.5-1 liters, sufficient for continuous operation up to 24 hours on low settings.
  • Humidity Output: Adjustable mist output settings to suit different humidity needs and room sizes.
  • Noise Level: Ultra-quiet operation (<35dB) to ensure a peaceful atmosphere, ideal for night use.
  • Water Indicator: LED light indicates when water is low, preventing the device from running dry.
  • Auto Shut-Off: Automatically turns off when the water tank is empty, ensuring safety and prolonging the lifespan of the humidifier.
  • Filter: Equipped with an optional replaceable filter to purify the water and prevent the spread of bacteria and mold.
  • Power Consumption: Energy-efficient design with low power consumption (20-40W), making it cost-effective to use.
  • Design: Modern and sleek design with a compact footprint, suitable for any interior décor. Easy to clean and refill.
  • Charging method: USB charging cable

Our humidifier combines functionality, efficiency, and style, making it an essential addition to your home for a healthier and more pleasant living experience.
